name: D-Link EAGLE PRO AI AX3200 Wi-Fi 6 Mesh Router - Up to 3,000 sq. ft - Up to 3200 Mbps - WPA3 - 2x Gigabit Ethernet LAN Ports - 1x Gigabit Ethernet WAN Port (M32)
shortName: D-Link EAGLE PRO AI AX3200 Wi-Fi 6 Mesh Router - Up to 3,000 sq. ft
description: D-Link Wi-Fi 6 mesh router with AX3200 speed and coverage up to 3000 sq ft for single unit mesh networking.
